title: Luscious Nutty Rajasthani Olives Chaat
description: A fluffy, nutty chaat that blends marinated olives with spiced chickpea pancakes and a smoky flambé touch, perfect for a hangover cure.
instructions: In a bowl whisk chickpea flour with water, cumin, coriander, garam masala, and chili powder until smooth and lump free.
Heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium heat and pour in the batter, spreading evenly.
Cook the batter for 6 minutes until the edges lift and the surface is dimpled.
Flip the thin pancake and cook for an additional 4 minutes until golden brown.
Transfer the pancake to a cutting board and slice into small squares.
In a separate pan gently fry sliced olives in a teaspoon of coconut oil until slightly caramelized, about 3 minutes.
Add a splash of rum to flambé the olives, letting the flame subside and smoke clear.
Toss the olive cubes into the pancake squares, then sprinkle toasted almonds, cilantro, mint, and lemon juice.
Drizzle the remaining coconut oil over the chaat and garnish with extra herbs.
Serve immediately as a fluffy, nutty hangover cure snack.
